payload.description: Stage 1: ESA Support - Platform F & associated station tracks in service November 2021. Stage 2: Universal Outlying Crossovers (Not ESA Support Effort) - MET Interlocking, Beaver Interlocking, Union Crossover.
Signal system cutover March 2020, Pocket Track In-Service Commissioning June 2021, Closeout November 2021

tool_args.label: Great Neck Pocket Track & Colonial Road Bridge

payload.project_name: Great Neck Pocket Track & Colonial Road Bridge
payload.description: Colonial Road Bridge construction completed August 2016, placed in service May 2016. Great Neck Pocket Track: Neck 3 crossover June 2022, Neck 2 crossover forecast December 2, 2022, Signal crossover forecast December 2, 2022, Commissioning forecast December 2, 2022
New yard support facility completion March 2020, Yard and supporting infrastructure completion October 2020, Closeout forecast July 2023

Options for Yard Track extensions are severely limited due to extensive development near the station. Advancement contingent upon MTA LIRR reaching an agreement with the Town of North Hempstead for real estate acquisition/swaps.
